# Subscription Pricing Changes

Acme Shop emphasizes transparency and value in its subscription pricing policies. Customers will receive at least 30 days' notice via email about any upcoming price increases, allowing time to decide on their subscription options. New pricing applies to the next billing cycle after the change, and prepaid subscriptions will only reflect the new rates after the prepaid term ends. Conversely, price decreases are automatically applied to the next billing cycle without requiring additional user action. Acme Shop aims to minimize customer impact from price changes resulting from external factors and offers customer support for any concerns or questions regarding these changes.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#subscription-pricing-changes]
